alien_inputs: replace generic per-slice interpreter dispatch with a direct row-major state-machine primitive
preserve exact scalar F32 accumulation order instead of changing the numerical algorithm

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Batch axis 0 row order is unchanged; scan order is forward for reverse=false and descending for reverse=true.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparison or tie-breaking behavior is introduced.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Each row accumulates with scalar f32 += in the same scan order; NaN propagation remains exitless and order-dependent.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state is read or written.
isomorphism_proof.fallback: All non-exact cases fall through to the existing generic scan path.
